holdings.infoBox: TUR is an equity ETF with a total of 76 individual holdings. The top holdings are ASELSAN ELEKTRONIK SANAYI VE TICAR stock at 12.47%, BIM BIRLESIK MAGAZALAR A at 9.01%, AKBANK A at 6.27%, TURKIYE PETROL RAFINERILERI A at 5.65%, and TURK HAVA YOLLARI AO A at 4.80%.

overview.description: The iShares MSCI Turkey ETF (TUR) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the MSCI Turkey IMI 25-50 index. The fund tracks the performance of a market-cap-weighted index of Turkish stocks. TUR was launched on Mar 26, 2008 and is issued by BlackRock.

data.title: These Single-Country ETFs Can Hedge Your U.S. Risk
data.text: Single-country funds can reduce overall portfolio risk by acting differently than the S&P 500, offering diversification beyond broad international indexes.

data.title: Ratings agency Moody's boosted Turkey's credit ratings, citing stabilizing and disinflationary central bank policy
data.text: The ratings agency said Friday it lifted the country's long-term foreign currency sovereign-credit ratings and local currency issuer ratings to Ba3 from B1.

data.title: Turkey Strong-Armed Inflation. Stocks Feel the Pain.
data.text: Rates need to fall more before Turkish savers shift to stocks again, and 47% annual inflation doesn't exactly signal a stable economy yet.

data.text: Move follows panic by foreign investors alarmed at death toll and $1bn worth of damage to buildings

data.text: Media reports said the halt came after Turkish stocks on the Istanbul exchange have plummeted 16% in the wake of two devastating earthquakes.

data.title: Turkey ETF slides after country rocked by massive earthquake
data.text: A massive earthquake struck Turkey and Syria on Monday, causing the Turkish stock market and an ETF benchmark that includes some of the country's major equities to decline.

data.title: Turkey ETF jumps more than 4% as Ankara and Washington forge ceasefire in Syria
data.text: A popular exchange traded fund Thursday afternoon added to its gains after Vice President Mike Pence said the U.S. and Turkey have agreed on a ceasefire in Syria.
